task_completion.description: Filter the dataset to include only deceased passengers (Survived = 0) with known ages

task_completion.description: Run a MEANS analysis on the YPLL variable to calculate the sum

privileged_info_for_vlm: The true calculated sum of YPLL for deceased passengers (Survived=0) with known ages (n=424) using a reference age of 75 is 18814.5. The maximum age of deceased passengers is 74.0, so the 'minimum of 0' condition is naturally met without extra logic. The VLM should look for the sum value of 18814.5 in the MEANS analysis output. (Note: Any hardcoded ground truth of 18235.0 is incorrect; 18814.5 is the verified true value).
